title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Lady Hardinge Medical College and Hospital (Acquisition) and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1977. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st February, 1978, vide notification No. S. O. 188(E), dated 12th January, 1978, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
